data.summary: [150K Discord Members Appreciation Gift] Blue Archive's Official Discord has hit 150K members! Log i
data.body:
[150K Discord Members Appreciation Gift]

Blue Archive's Official Discord has hit 150K members!
Log in now to receive our sincerest gift to celebrate this special occasion! ❤️

🎁Thank-You GIft: 10-Recruitment Ticket x1
🗓️Period: 2/14 (Wed) 9:00 AM ~ 2/21 (Wed) 2:59 PM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
